title: alpha.
description: This project reverts Minecraft to it's 1.8 beta form with ARG style creatures and entities
body:
A Modpack based around 1.8 beta minecraft, featuring entities and structures that seem out of place.

You should not download this if you dont want it messing with things like your background or your game window, it can seriously impair gameplay and make it frustrating to progress

You should download this if you want to experience both the things listed above and to add an old feel to minecraft

WARNING:Can create text files, change your background, and mess with your game window. THIS DOES NOT CONTAIN MALWARE!! also adds some old style structures to the game to add even more mysteriousness to the mix
